# RentMyGadgets

> RentMyGadgets is a technology equipment rental service offering flexible monthly plans for premium laptops, cameras, desktops, and accessories.

## About

RentMyGadgets makes high-end technology accessible through affordable rental options. We offer flexible monthly rental plans with no long-term contracts, fast delivery in select areas, and optional GadgetCare+ damage protection.

## How It Works

1. Browse our catalog of laptops, desktops, cameras, audio equipment, and accessories
2. Choose your rental period: 1, 3, 6, or 12 months (longer terms get bigger discounts)
3. We ship your equipment with fast delivery available in select areas
4. Use your equipment for as long as you need
5. Return it with our prepaid shipping label when done

## Rental Pricing

- 1 Month: Full monthly rate
- 3 Months: 10% monthly rate discount
- 6 Months: 20% monthly rate discount
- 12 Months: 30% monthly rate discount

## Product Categories

- [Laptops](/categories): MacBooks, Windows laptops, and Chromebooks
- [Desktops](/categories): High-performance desktop computers
- [Cameras](/categories): DSLR, mirrorless, and video cameras
- [Audio](/categories): Professional microphones, speakers, and headphones
- [Accessories](/categories): Monitors, keyboards, mice, and peripherals
- [Networking](/categories): Routers, switches, and networking equipment

## Key Features

- **GadgetCare+ Protection**: Optional plan covering accidental damage, liquid spills, hardware malfunctions, and priority repairs (15% of rental total)
- **Rent-to-Own**: After 6 months, purchase your rental at a reduced buyout price
- **Free Shipping**: On orders of 3 or more months
- **14-Day Free Returns**: On all rentals
- **Quality Checked**: Every item inspected before shipping
